name: Community Cleanup Drive
description: Join us for a community cleanup drive where we'll work together to make our local park cleaner and more beautiful. All supplies provided.

name: Food Festival
description: Experience a delicious food festival featuring cuisines from around the world. Local restaurants and food vendors will showcase their specialties.

name: Tech Meetup
description: Connect with local tech enthusiasts and professionals. We'll discuss emerging technologies, share project ideas, and network with like-minded individuals.

name: Music Night
description: Enjoy an evening of live music performances featuring local musicians and bands. Various genres from jazz to rock will be represented.

name: Art Exhibition
description: Celebrate local artists at our community art exhibition. View paintings, sculptures, and installations created by talented members of our community.

name: Sports Day
description: Participate in various sports activities including soccer, basketball, volleyball, and racing. Fun competitions with prizes for all age groups.
